Jesse, I apologize, but get on your toes, because if it misses your head, we 've still got a chance. You can raise the level. No, I did n't fill it. Guys, I think this is the end of the line for me. I 'm going to try to stand on my tiptoes, but honestly, I do n't think it helps much, it only adds a few centimeters. Guys, this is our chance to win. If Jessie gives up, we already win. Hey everyone, you really need to take a close look at this because it appears that after all that effort, she has finally decided to throw in the towel and give up entirely. She finally surrendered. We emerged victorious! As you saw, both Bruno and I won. Man, just to get there ... Congratulations, Enaldinho, you 're the best, man!
